import requests, re, json, sys
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
from urllib.parse import urljoin, urlparse

BASE_URL = 'https://ivxholding.com'
print(f"=== PHASE 2 — LANDING PAGE AUDIT: {BASE_URL} ===\n")

resp = requests.get(BASE_URL, timeout=20, headers={
    'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/126.0.0.0 Safari/537.36'
})
resp.raise_for_status()
html = resp.text
soup = BeautifulSoup(html, 'lxml')

print("--- Basic Metrics ---")
print(f"status: {resp.status_code}")
print(f"content_length: {len(resp.content)} bytes")
print(f"title: {soup.title.string if soup.title else 'MISSING'}")
print(f"viewport: {soup.find('meta',attrs={'name':'viewport'}).get('content') if soup.find('meta',attrs={'name':'viewport'}) else 'MISSING'}")

print("\n--- Section Audit ---")
sections = soup.find_all('section')
print(f"total sections: {len(sections)}")
empty_sections = 0
for i, sec in enumerate(sections):
    text = sec.get_text(strip=True)
    imgs = len(sec.find_all('img'))
    vids = len(sec.find_all('video'))
    if not text and imgs == 0 and vids == 0:
        empty_sections += 1
        print(f"  EMPTY section {i}: {sec.get('id')} class={sec.get('class')}")
print(f"empty_sections: {empty_sections}")

# Try to identify required sections by keywords
keywords = {
    'hero': ['hero','banner','home-hero','main-hero'],
    'featured_properties': ['featured','properties','property','listings'],
    'reels': ['reel','deals-reel','video-reel','shorts','ivx-reels'],
    'how_it_works': ['how it works','how-it-works','steps','process','works'],
    'reviews': ['review','testimonial','testimonials','rating','ratings'],
    'security': ['security','trust','safe','secure','protected'],
    'partners': ['partner','partners','investor','sponsors'],
    'registration': ['register','signup','sign-up','join','get-started','membership'],
    'footer': ['footer','contact','footer-section'],
    'navigation': ['nav','navbar','navigation','menu'],
    'mobile_menu': ['mobile-menu','hamburger','menu-toggle','mobile-nav'],
    'cta': ['cta','call-to-action','get-started','invest-now','join-now']
}

section_ids = [s.get('id','') for s in sections]
section_classes = []
for s in sections:
    c = s.get('class',[])
    if isinstance(c, list):
        section_classes.extend(c)
    elif isinstance(c, str):
        section_classes.append(c)
all_text = soup.get_text().lower()

for name, words in keywords.items():
    found = False
    for w in words:
        if w in section_ids or w in section_classes or w in all_text:
            found = True
            break
    print(f"  {name}: {'PASS' if found else 'FAIL'}")

print("\n--- Image Audit ---")
imgs = soup.find_all('img')
print(f"total images: {len(imgs)}")
imgs_without_src = [i for i in imgs if not i.get('src')]
print(f"images without src: {len(imgs_without_src)}")
imgs_without_alt = [i for i in imgs if not i.get('alt')]
print(f"images without alt: {len(imgs_without_alt)}")
imgs_lazy = [i for i in imgs if i.get('loading') == 'lazy']
print(f"lazy-loaded images: {len(imgs_lazy)}")

# Check images that are not data URIs and not inline
broken = 0
external = 0
checked = 0
for img in imgs[:30]:  # limit to avoid hammering
    src = img.get('src')
    if not src or src.startswith('data:') or src.startswith('blob:'):
        continue
    url = urljoin(BASE_URL, src)
    if urlparse(url).netloc != 'ivxholding.com':
        external += 1
        continue
    try:
        r = requests.head(url, timeout=8, allow_redirects=True, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'})
        checked += 1
        if r.status_code >= 400:
            print(f"  BROKEN image ({r.status_code}): {url}")
            broken += 1
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  ERROR checking image: {url} | {e}")
        broken += 1
print(f"checked internal images: {checked}, broken: {broken}, external: {external}")

print("\n--- Video Audit ---")
vids = soup.find_all('video')
print(f"total video elements: {len(vids)}")
for v in vids[:5]:
    print(f"  video src={v.get('src')} poster={v.get('poster')} class={v.get('class')}")

print("\n--- CSS / Layout Audit ---")
styles = ' '.join([s.get_text() for s in soup.find_all('style')])
overflow_hidden = len(re.findall(r'overflow-x\s*:\s*hidden', html, re.IGNORECASE))
fixed_widths = re.findall(r'(?:width|max-width|min-width)\s*:\s*(\d+px)', html, re.IGNORECASE)
large_fixed = [w for w in fixed_widths if int(w[:-2]) > 600]
print(f"overflow-x:hidden occurrences: {overflow_hidden}")
print(f"fixed widths >600px: {len(large_fixed)} (examples: {large_fixed[:10]})")

print("\n--- Script Audit ---")
scripts = soup.find_all('script')
print(f"total scripts: {len(scripts)}")
external_scripts = [s for s in scripts if s.get('src')]
inline_scripts = [s for s in scripts if not s.get('src')]
print(f"external scripts: {len(external_scripts)}, inline: {len(inline_scripts)}")
console_logs = 0
for s in scripts:
    if s.string:
        console_logs += len(re.findall(r'console\.log', s.string))
print(f"inline console.log: {console_logs}")

# Check all external scripts are reachable
script_broken = 0
for s in external_scripts:
    src = s.get('src')
    if not src or src.startswith('data:'):
        continue
    url = urljoin(BASE_URL, src)
    try:
        r = requests.head(url, timeout=8, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'})
        if r.status_code >= 400:
            print(f"  BROKEN script ({r.status_code}): {url}")
            script_broken += 1
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  ERROR script: {url} | {e}")
        script_broken += 1
print(f"broken external scripts: {script_broken}")

print("\n--- Link Audit ---")
links = soup.find_all('a', href=True)
print(f"total links: {len(links)}")

print("\n--- Form Audit ---")
forms = soup.find_all('form')
print(f"total forms: {len(forms)}")
for f in forms:
    print(f"  form action={f.get('action')} method={f.get('method')} id={f.get('id')} class={f.get('class')}")

print("\n--- Mobile / Responsive Audit ---")
viewport_meta = soup.find('meta', attrs={'name': 'viewport'})
print(f"viewport: {viewport_meta.get('content') if viewport_meta else 'MISSING'}")
PYEOF

results['landing']['console_log_count'] = len(re.findall(r'console\.log', html))
results['landing']['overflow_hidden'] = len(re.findall(r'overflow-x\s*:\s*hidden', html, re.IGNORECASE))

# Chat
r = requests.get(CHAT, timeout=15)
results['chat'] = {"status": r.status_code, "cf_cache": r.headers.get('cf-cache-status'), "last_modified": r.headers.get('last-modified')}

# SEO basics
results['seo'] = {
    "title": soup.title.string if soup.title else None,
    "viewport": soup.find('meta', attrs={'name':'viewport'}).get('content') if soup.find('meta', attrs={'name':'viewport'}) else None,
    "description": soup.find('meta', attrs={'name':'description'}).get('content') if soup.find('meta', attrs={'name':'description'}) else None,
    "canonical": soup.find('link', attrs={'rel':'canonical'}).get('href') if soup.find('link', attrs={'rel':'canonical'}) else None,
}

# Performance: TTFB approximation
import time
start = time.time()
r = requests.get(LANDING, timeout=15)
ttfb = time.time() - start
results['performance'] = {"ttfb_seconds": round(ttb, 3), "content_length": len(r.content)}

# Accessibility: images alt text
imgs = soup.find_all('img')
results['accessibility'] = {
    "total_images": len(imgs),
    "images_without_alt": len([i for i in imgs if not i.get('alt')]),
    "aria_labels": len([t for t in soup.find_all() if t.get('aria-label')]),
}

with open('/home/user/rork-app/qa-evidence/final-regression.json','w') as f:
